general.name: mos_target_hecate_1_1
general.description: The Heraklion Extragalactic Catalogue (HECATE). For more details, refer to Kovlakas et al. 2021 (https://academic.oup.com/mnras/article/506/2/1896/6309318).
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_hecate_1_1.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

id_iras.name: id_iras
id_iras.description: Name in IRAS-RBGS, or in RIFSCz if in the form Fxxxxx+xxxx

sdss_photid.name: sdss_photid
sdss_photid.description: SDSS photometric ID (consistent with DR8 releases and later)

sdss_specid.name: sdss_specid
sdss_specid.description: SDSS spectroscopic ID (consistent with DR8 releases and later)

f_astrom.name: f_astrom
f_astrom.description: Astrometric precision flag: -1 for ~0.1 arcsec, 0 for 1 arcsec, 1 for 10 arcsec, etc

rsource.name: rsource
rsource.description: Source of the galaxy-size information: H=HyperLEDA, S=SDSS, 2=2MASS, 6=2dFGS, W=WINGS, Y=SkyMapper, A=Amiga-CIG, K=UNGC, V=VIII/77, 1=KKH2001, 7=KKH2007, N=NED

rflag.name: rflag
rflag.description: Galaxy-size information flag: 0=missing, 1=all axes and positional angle defined, 2=r2 and/or pa were missing and they were set equal to r1 and 0 (circular isophote)

t.name: t
t.description: Numerical Hubble-type following the de Vaucouleurs et al. 1976 system

e_v.name: e_v
e_v.description: Uncertainty on the heliocentric radial velocity

e_v_vir.name: e_v_vir
e_v_vir.description: Uncertainty on the Virgo-infall corrected radial velocity

ndist.name: ndist
ndist.description: Number of redshift-independent measurements in NED-D used for the computation of the distance

edist.name: edist
edist.description: If True, the NED-D distance measurements had uncertainties

d_lo68.name: d_lo68
d_lo68.description: Lower bound of the 68% confidence interval of the distance

d_hi68.name: d_hi68
d_hi68.description: Upper bound of the 68% confidence interval of the distance

d_lo95.name: d_lo95
d_lo95.description: Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval of the distance

d_hi95.name: d_hi95
d_hi95.description: Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval of the distance

dmethod.name: dmethod
dmethod.description: Method for the estimation of the distance: N=using NED-D distance measurements, Z=regression, Zv=regression for Virgo Cluster members, C=distance from NED-D measurements but uncertainty from regression, Cv=distance from NED-D measurements but uncertainty from Virgo Cluster regressor

e_ut.name: e_ut
e_ut.description: Uncertainty on the total U-band apparent magnitude

e_bt.name: e_bt
e_bt.description: Uncertainty on the total B-band apparent magnitude

e_vt.name: e_vt
e_vt.description: Uncertainty on the total V-band apparent magnitude

e_it.name: e_it
e_it.description: Uncertainty on the total I-band apparent magnitude

q12.name: q12
q12.description: Quality flag for the 12μm-band flux from IRAS: 0=not in IRAS, 1=upper limit, 2=moderate, 3=high, 4=flux from IRAS-RBGS

q25.name: q25
q25.description: Quality flag for the 25μm-band flux from IRAS: 0=not in IRAS, 1=upper limit, 2=moderate, 3=high, 4=flux from IRAS-RBGS

q60.name: q60
q60.description: Quality flag for the 60μm-band flux from IRAS: 0=not in IRAS, 1=upper limit, 2=moderate, 3=high, 4=flux from IRAS-RBGS

q100.name: q100
q100.description: Quality flag for the 100μm-band flux from IRAS: 0=not in IRAS, 1=upper limit, 2=moderate, 3=high, 4=flux from IRAS-RBGS

wf1.name: wf1
wf1.description: 3.3μm-band (W1) apparent magnitude in the WISE forced photometry catalog

wf2.name: wf2
wf2.description: 4.6μm-band (W2) apparent magnitude in the WISE forced photometry catalog

wf3.name: wf3
wf3.description: 12μm-band (W3) apparent magnitude in the WISE forced photometry catalog

wf4.name: wf4
wf4.description: 22μm-band (W4) apparent magnitude in the WISE forced photometry catalog

e_wf1.name: e_wf1
e_wf1.description: Uncertainty on the 3.3μm-band (W1) apparent magnitude in the WISE forced photometry catalog

e_wf2.name: e_wf2
e_wf2.description: Uncertainty on the 4.6μm-band (W2) apparent magnitude in the WISE forced photometry catalog

e_wf3.name: e_wf3
e_wf3.description: Uncertainty on the 12μm-band (W3) apparent magnitude in the WISE forced photometry catalog

e_wf4.name: e_wf4
e_wf4.description: Uncertainty on the 22μm-band (W4) apparent magnitude in the WISE forced photometry catalog

wfpoint.name: wfpoint
wfpoint.description: True if point source in the WISE forced photometry catalog

wftreat.name: wftreat
wftreat.description: True if treated as point source in the WISE forced photometry catalog

e_j.name: e_j
e_j.description: Uncertainty on the J-band apparent magnitude in 2MASS

e_h.name: e_h
e_h.description: Uncertainty on the H-band apparent magnitude in 2MASS

e_k.name: e_k
e_k.description: Uncertainty on the K-band apparent magnitude in 2MASS

flag_2mass.name: flag_2mass
flag_2mass.description: Source of the 2MASS ID and magnitudes: 0=none, 1=LGA, 2=XSC, 3=PSC

e_u.name: e_u
e_u.description: Uncertainty on the u-band SDSS apparent magnitude

e_g.name: e_g
e_g.description: Uncertainty on the g-band SDSS apparent magnitude

e_r.name: e_r
e_r.description: Uncertainty on the r-band SDSS apparent magnitude

e_i.name: e_i
e_i.description: Uncertainty on the i-band SDSS apparent magnitude

e_z.name: e_z
e_z.description: Uncertainty on the z-band SDSS apparent magnitude

logl_tir.name: logl_tir
logl_tir.description: Decimal logarithm of the total-infrared (TIR) luminosity in solar luminosities

logl_fir.name: logl_fir
logl_fir.description: Decimal logarithm of the far-infrared (FIR) luminosity in solar luminosities

logl_60u.name: logl_60u
logl_60u.description: Decimal logarithm of the 60μm-band luminosity in solar luminosities

logl_12u.name: logl_12u
logl_12u.description: Decimal logarithm of the 12μm-band luminosity in solar luminosities

logl_22u.name: logl_22u
logl_22u.description: Decimal logarithm of the 22μm-band luminosity in solar luminosities

logl_k.name: logl_k
logl_k.description: Decimal logarithm of the K-band luminosity in solar luminosities

ml_ratio.name: ml_ratio
ml_ratio.description: Mass-to-light ratio for the 2MASS K-band using SDSS g-r colour (Bell et al. 2003)

logsfr_tir.name: logsfr_tir
logsfr_tir.description: Decimal logarithm of the TIR-based star-formation rate in solar masses per year

logsfr_fir.name: logsfr_fir
logsfr_fir.description: Decimal logarithm of the FIR-based star-formation rate in solar masses per year

logsfr_60u.name: logsfr_60u
logsfr_60u.description: Decimal logarithm of the 60μm-based star-formation rate in solar masses per year

logsfr_12u.name: logsfr_12u
logsfr_12u.description: Decimal logarithm of the 12μm-based star-formation rate in solar masses per year

logsfr_22u.name: logsfr_22u
logsfr_22u.description: Decimal logarithm of the 22μm-based star-formation rate in solar masses per year

logsfr_hec.name: logsfr_hec
logsfr_hec.description: Decimal logarithm of the homogenised star-formation rate in solar masses per year

flag_sfr_hec.name: flag_sfr_hec
flag_sfr_hec.description: Flag indicating the source of the photometry and the SFR indicator used in the homogenised SFR: RT=IRAS-RBGS photometry and TIR indicator, FT=RIFSCz photometry and TIR indicator, FF=RIFSCz photometry and FIR indicator, W3=WISE W3-band forced photometry and indicator, W4=WISE W4-band forced photometry and indicator

logm_hec.name: logm_hec
logm_hec.description: Decimal logarithm of the total stellar mass in solar masses

logsfr_gsw.name: logsfr_gsw
logsfr_gsw.description: Decimal logarithm of the SED-based star-formation rate from the GSWLC-2 in solar masses per year

logm_gsw.name: logm_gsw
logm_gsw.description: Decimal logarithm of the SED-based stellar mass from the GSWLC-2 in solar masses

min_snr.name: min_snr
min_snr.description: Minimum signal-to-noise ratio of the emission lines used for the activity classification

flag_metal.name: flag_metal
flag_metal.description: Metallicity flag: -1=missing, 0=reliable, 1=O3N2 ratio >2 (outside the PP04 range), 2=low signal-to-noise ratio (<3 for the weakest line)

class_sp.name: class_sp
class_sp.description: Nuclear activity classification using the method in Stampoulis et al. 2019: 0=star-forming, 1=Seyfert, 2=LINER, 3=composite, -1=unknown

agn_s17.name: agn_s17
agn_s17.description: AGN classification in She et al. 2017: Y=AGN, N=non-AGN, ?=unknown

agn_hec.name: agn_hec
agn_hec.description: Adopted activity classification based on the combination of class_sp and agn_s17: Y=AGN, N=non-AGN, ?=unknown
